title: Base58
description: A software engineering school built on the bitcoin standard. The team led by Lisa Neigut (aka "niftynei") offers online & in-person classes.

title: Mempool Bitcoin Explorer
description: A mempool and blockchain explorer for the Bitcoin community, focusing on the transaction fee market and multi-layer ecosystem, completely self-hosted.

title: Blixt Wallet
description: A self-custodial open-source Bitcoin Lightning Wallet for Android with focus on usability and user experience, powered by lnd and Neutrino SPV.

title: Zeus Lightning App
description: An open-source, non-custodial Bitcoin wallet that gives you full control over how you make payments. Make lightning fast payments in the palm of your hand.
